invalidLink.title: Invalid link
invalidLink.body: This link no longer exists or was never generated. If you just made a purchase, check your confirmation email.

download.exhaustedNotice: You've reached the maximum number of downloads. If you've lost the file, contact the merchant.
download.exhaustedNoticeWithMax: You've reached the maximum number of downloads ({{max}}). If you've lost the file, contact the merchant.
download.expiredNotice: This link is no longer valid (expired on {{date}}). Contact the merchant for a new link.
download.cancelledNotice: The associated order has been cancelled and the download is no longer available.

ticket.invalidBody: The link may be expired or the ticket may have been cancelled. Contact the organizer if you have questions.
ticket.errorBody: Error loading the ticket. Please try again.
ticket.qrHint: Show this QR at the entrance for check-in.
ticket.offlineHint: Keep this page: you'll be able to reopen it offline if your phone has loaded it at least once.

booking.notFoundBody: The link may be expired or the booking has been cancelled. Contact the store if you need assistance.
booking.errorBody: Unable to load the booking. Please try again later.
booking.codeHint: Show it to the professional when you arrive.
booking.privateLinkHint: Private link — keep it to consult your booking details.

digital.notFoundBody: The link may not be valid or the product has been removed.
digital.errorBody: Unable to load the product. Please try again later.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.linkAfterPayment: 🔒 After payment you'll receive a personal download link by email.
howItWorks.notPublic: 🛡️ The file is never publicly accessible: only your authorized link can download it.

digital.checkoutHint: At checkout you'll be asked for name and email to receive the download link.

physical.notFoundBody: The link may not be valid or the product has been removed.
physical.errorBody: Unable to load the product. Please try again later.

fulfillment.title: Delivery method
fulfillment.body: At checkout you can choose from the available methods:
fulfillment.fallback: Delivery details to be agreed with the merchant.

physical.checkoutHint: At checkout you'll be asked for name, email and delivery method.

reservationConfirmation.notFoundBody: The link may be expired or the reservation has been cancelled. Contact the store if you need assistance.
reservationConfirmation.errorBody: Unable to load the reservation. Please try again later.
reservationConfirmation.codeHint: Show it on arrival or when requested.
reservationConfirmation.privateLinkHint: Private link — keep it to consult your reservation details.

course.notFoundBody: The link may not be valid or the course has been removed.
course.errorBody: Unable to load the course. Please try again later.

accountRequired.title: Account required
accountRequired.body: At checkout we'll ask you to log in or sign up to follow the course from your customer area.

course.afterPurchaseHint: After purchase the course will appear in your customer area under "My courses".

reservation.notFoundBody: The link may not be valid or the product has been removed.
reservation.errorBody: Unable to load the product. Please try again later.
reservation.whenHeadingRange: When do you want to book

rangePicker.hintStart: Click a day to start and then a second day to select the range. Days in red are already booked.
rangePicker.hintEnd: Great, now pick the end day. Days in red are already booked and not selectable.

reservation.checkoutHint: At checkout you'll be asked for name, email and terms acceptance.

event.notFoundBody: This event may have been removed or no longer exists.
event.errorBody: Error loading. Please try again in a moment.
event.checkoutHint: At checkout you'll be asked for name, email and delivery method; you can also enter discount codes there.
event.soldOutBody: This event is fully booked. Take a look at the other upcoming events.
event.tiersHint: You can combine tier types (e.g. 2 Standard + 1 VIP).

product.notFoundBody: The requested product is no longer available.
product.optionsHint: Only one option can be selected.
product.scheduleHint: Slots available in the next 30 days.
product.customRequestToggle: No suitable time? Propose a custom date →

customRequest.hintNoSlots: No preconfigured slots. Indicate your preferred time; the request will be confirmed by the merchant.
customRequest.notesPlaceholder: Add info useful to the merchant (e.g. flexibility, preferences…)
customRequest.footerHint: ⏳ The booking will remain pending merchant confirmation. Expected duration: {{minutes}} minutes.

scenario4.heading: How to proceed
scenario4.body: Product ready to purchase. To agree on date and time, write to the merchant directly or proceed to checkout: the merchant will contact you to schedule.

product.scenarioOptionsOnly: Proceed to checkout. The merchant will contact you to agree on date and time.

summary.heading: Summary
summary.lockedTitle: Complete the selections above to proceed
summary.checkoutHintActive: At checkout you'll be asked for name, email and terms acceptance.
summary.checkoutHintLocked: The Proceed button activates after you've made your choices.

availability.empty_30d: No slots available in the next 30 days.
availability.empty_hint: Contact the merchant for custom availability.
availability.no_slots_today: No times available on this day.
availability.pick_day_for_slots: Pick a day from the calendar to see available times.

banner.step1: Pick <1>start day and time</1> in the <2>Start</2> panel.
banner.step2: Now pick the <1>end time</1> in the <2>End</2> panel (can be on a different day).

help.from_after_to: Pick start day and time first

aria.not_enough_space: Not enough room for the minimum duration

calendar.searchPlaceholder: Search a retreat, a place, an organizer…
calendar.emptyFiltered: Try widening your search: remove a filter or check another month.

account.title: My bookings
account.loginBody: No password needed: we'll email you a sign-in link.
account.sentBody: If an account exists for this address, you'll receive a sign-in link valid for 15 minutes.
account.expiredBody: No problem: enter your email and we'll send a new one.
account.requestError: Something went wrong. Try again in a minute.
account.loadError: We can't load your bookings right now. Try again shortly.
